# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-042](task-0109): Provider Audit Logging

## Purpose

Implement provider audit logging.

## Scope

- Audit format
- Logging
- Retention

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement logging
3. Set retention

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Logging works
3. Retention set
